overall.description: Gameplay footage from Batman: Arkham Knight showing the character traversing rain-soaked rooftops in Gotham City. The clip features atmospheric night lighting with neon signs, a prominent gothic clock tower, and an industrial waterfront with a hovering airship, showcasing the game's detailed environments and weather effects.

events.description: Batman begins walking slowly along the catwalk from a standing position

agents.ego_description: Batman walks deliberately along the elevated catwalk, cape flowing behind him as he surveys the Gotham skyline with the clock tower in view

entered.detail: Gothic-style clock tower with illuminated clock face visible against the night sky
Elevated metal walkway with glass panel railings and metal truss supports
Vertical neon signage with bright colors attached to adjacent building
Distant city buildings with scattered window lights under cloudy skies

segments.scene_description: Batman stands on an elevated rooftop catwalk during a rainy night, with a prominent gothic clock tower visible in the distance. He begins walking along the metal walkway, passing neon signs and glass railings as he surveys the illuminated city skyline.

events.description: Scene cuts to waterfront view revealing large airship hovering over industrial docks
Camera begins slow pan around Batman, revealing dock structures and harbor

agents.ego_description: Batman stands silhouetted against the stormy night sky at the rooftop edge, observing the airship and harbor below

notable_agents.action: Large industrial airship hovering stationary over the water with illuminated running lights

entered.detail: Industrial crane structures silhouetted against the harbor lights
Large cylindrical storage tanks with blue accent lighting
Dark water surface of the industrial harbor reflecting city lights
Tall industrial cooling tower with metal scaffolding

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wide-open waterfront view where Batman stands at the edge of an industrial rooftop. A massive airship hovers over the harbor while the camera pans to reveal dock cranes, storage tanks, and the dark water below, with the city lights twinkling in the distance.

events.description: Batman turns from the edge and begins running along the rooftop toward the interior

agents.ego_description: Batman runs along the rooftop with cape billowing, moving past HVAC units and industrial equipment as he heads deeper into the building complex

notable_agents.action: Airship remains visible in the distance, slowly moving away over the harbor

entered.detail: Large rooftop air conditioning and ventilation units with metal housings
Red metal cage enclosure structure on the rooftop
Exposed metal pipes and ductwork running across the roof surface

segments.scene_description: Batman turns from the waterfront edge and begins running along the industrial rooftop, passing large HVAC units, metal cage structures, and exposed piping. The airship remains visible in the distant left background as he moves deeper into the rooftop mechanical area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a high-altitude gothic rooftop toward an expansive industrial waterfront under a rainy night sky. It begins with Batman walking along an elevated metal catwalk, passing neon signs and glass railings with a prominent gothic clock tower looming in the distance. As the camera moves forward, the perspective opens up to a wide waterfront view where a massive airship hovers over a harbor filled with dock cranes and storage tanks. The scene then shifts as Batman turns away from the edge and begins running across the industrial roof, passing large HVAC units and exposed piping while the airship remains a distant silhouette in the background.
